mapper.delete: DELETE /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-03_2#Sql001 */ FROM BB_ACCEPT A WHERE A.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND A.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}） AND A.BB_BRANCH_CODE = UPPER(RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ')) AND TO_NUMBER(A.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})

DELETE /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-03_2#Sql015 */ FROM SR_ACCEPT B WHERE B.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND B.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}） AND B.BB_BRANCH_CODE = UPPER(RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ')) AND TO_NUMBER(B.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})
